conflicts.conflict_description: Requirements specify mutually exclusive connectivity modes - cannot be both offline and require continuous connection

impact.technical: Impossible to implement both requirements as stated
impact.business: User expectations unclear - will users have offline access or not?

pros: Better user experience in low connectivity
cons: Some features may be limited offline

resolution_options.description: Support both online and offline modes

conflicts.recommended_resolution: Implement offline-first with sync: Core features work offline, sync when connected. Remove requirement for continuous connection.

requirements.text: Deliver mobile app by March 1 (requires 3 developers, 8 weeks)
Complete API redesign by March 1 (requires 3 developers, 8 weeks)

conflicts.conflict_description: Both requirements need same team resource for same duration but have same deadline

impact.technical: Cannot complete both with available team
impact.timeline: Need to adjust schedule or add resources

resolution_options.description: Prioritize mobile app, defer API redesign to Q2
cons: Technical debt from old API persists

conflicts.recommended_resolution: Prioritize mobile app for March 1, reschedule API redesign to May 1

conflict_matrix.description: Requirements that conflict with each other

dependency_graph.description: Requirements with dependencies that may cause conflicts

dependencies.conflict_note: Cannot implement data sync strategy until offline/online conflict resolved

immediate_action.action: Schedule stakeholder meeting to decide on connectivity model

high_priority.action: Adjust project timeline or allocate additional resources

preventive_measures: Review new requirements against existing ones before approval
Regular conflict scanning during requirements gathering
